_comment: Canonical accessible foreground/background token pairings for BDS. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH consumed by: scripts/validate-themes.js (the CI contrast gate), stories/ContrastCompliance.stories.tsx (the Storybook dashboard), and the published foundation doc primitives/color-pairings.mdx (its matrix is generated via `node scripts/validate-themes.js --emit-matrix`). Each pairing is evaluated in BOTH the Brik light and dark default themes. thresholdType assignment follows the locked policy below. A pairing with `darkException` whose DARK result falls below threshold is REPORTED (not failed) and linked to its tracking issue — the known systemic dark-mode service-tier gap. Add a pairing here; never hardcode a pair list in a consumer.
policy: AAA (7:1) for primary body/small text where the surface affords it; AA (4.5:1) for colored brand/service text and on-color neutrals; AA-large (3:1) for large/heading and intentionally-muted/decorative text. Brand-primary fills (CTA buttons/surfaces) and brand accent text hold the vibrant poppy-light brand color (brand-kit canon) and are gated AA-large (3:1) — UI-component fills + large/bold CTA labels and heading/accent text; small body copy NEVER uses brand-primary, it uses --text-primary (BDS-22; usage rule in BDS-18). Service text-bearing regions use the pale `-lightest` surface step (AAA in light); the mid-tone base step is decorative and gated at AA only.

pairings.label: Solid Tag / MultiSelect chip label on fill
SegmentedControl inactive hover label on tertiary fill
Brand text on page
pairings.note: Brand-primary text is vibrant poppy-light (brand-kit canon) in its heading/accent role — 3.78:1 on white, gated AA-large (3:1). Small body copy uses --text-primary; usage rule tracked in BDS-18 (BDS-22).

pairings.label: On-color label on brand fill
pairings.note: White CTA label on the vibrant poppy-light brand fill (3.78:1) — a UI-component fill with a large/bold label, gated AA-large (3:1), same basis as the service inverse-card fills (BDS-22).

pairings.label: On-color label on brand fill (hover)
pairings.note: White label on the darkened hover fill (poppy-dark, ~6.2:1 both modes). Fills darken on interaction in light AND dark mode so the white label stays legible; dark mode formerly brightened to poppy-lighter and failed at 1.89:1. --surface-brand-primary-hover resolves to the same value (#1055).

pairings.label: On-color label on brand fill (pressed)
pairings.note: White label on the darkened pressed fill (poppy-darker, ~10.2:1 both modes); dark mode formerly brightened to poppy-lightest and failed at 1.12:1. --surface-brand-primary-pressed resolves to the same value (#1055).

pairings.label: Secondary Button label on hover/press fill
Outline Button label on hover/press fill
pairings.note: Vibrant brand label on the neutral hover fill (3.38:1 light) — large/semibold button label, gated AA-large (3:1) (BDS-22).

pairings.label: Service brand — text on pale surface

darkException.reason: ADR-011 dark-mode softening lightens service context text one tier while the surface stays fixed-light, eroding contrast

pairings.label: Service brand — text on mid-tone surface

darkException.reason: mid-tone base service surface is decorative; dark-mode softening erodes contrast

pairings.label: Service marketing — text on pale surface

darkException.reason: ADR-011 dark-mode softening erodes service context-text contrast on fixed-light surfaces

pairings.label: Service marketing — text on mid-tone surface

darkException.reason: mid-tone base service surface is decorative; dark-mode softening erodes contrast

darkException.reason: ADR-011 dark-mode softening erodes service context-text contrast on fixed-light surfaces

darkException.reason: ADR-011 dark-mode softening erodes service context-text contrast on fixed-light surfaces
